nasb.text: Put all her young bulls to the sword; Let them go down to the slaughter! Woe be upon them, for their day has come, The time of their punishment.

esv.text: Kill all her bulls; let them go down to the slaughter. Woe to them, for their day has come, the time of their punishment.

cnv.text: 要擊殺它所有的公牛， 使他們下去被屠殺！ 他們有禍了！因為他們的日子， 就是他們受懲罰的時候，來到了。

ccb.text: 你们要杀掉她所有的士兵， 把他们全部屠杀。 他们大祸临头了， 惩罚他们的日子到了。
